title: Observability, backup, log retention, metric alerts, final packaging and QA proofing
key_decisions: Observability metrics collected from OS (os module): cpu_utilization_percent, memory_used_mb, memory_free_mb, active_jobs, open_parking_alerts, open_after_sales_tickets
Backup manifest = JSON row counts (not mysqldump); verifyBackup validates manifest structure; restore procedure documented in docs/restore.md
Log search reads YYYY-MM-DD.log files line-by-line via readline; no DB; 7 filter types; paginated
database/ folder moved from repo root to repo/backend/database/; docker-compose.yml and Dockerfile updated
runbooks/ renamed to docs/ in both repo/ and repo/backend/; no code references changed
tsconfig.json updated: include database/**/* so seed.ts compiles to dist/database/seeders/seed.js
Dockerfile fixed: removed broken COPY ../database/schema.prisma; replaced with COPY prisma ./prisma
5 runbook docs: backup.md, restore.md, cert-rotation.md, retention-cleanup.md, troubleshooting.md
New top-level docs: README.md, docs/design.md, docs/api-spec.md, docs/test-plan.md, docs/deployment.md, docs/runbook.md
questions.md updated with Q11-Q15 covering evidence dedup, carrier sync, database folder, TLS removal, backup format
files_updated: backend/src/jobs/index.ts (backup, log-retention, metric-alert workers imported; queue count=8)
